final:
module top_module(
    input A1,
    input A2,
    input B1,
    input clk,
    input reset_n,
    input enable,
    output reg X
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or negedge reset_n or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (!reset_n) begin
        X <= 0;
    end else if (enable) begin
        X <= A1 & A2;
    end
end

endmodule
